testcase.name: test_page_navigation

failure.message: AssertionError: Page URL expected to be 're.compile('PAGE_10_BE84_URL')' Actual value: https://example.com/ Call log: - Expect "to_have_url" with timeout 5000ms 9 × unexpected value "https://example.com/"

testcase.failure: tests\page_10_be84\test_page_10_be84.py:16: in test_page_navigation expect(page).to_have_url(re.compile(r"PAGE_10_BE84_URL")) E AssertionError: Page URL expected to be 're.compile('PAGE_10_BE84_URL')' E Actual value: https://example.com/ E Call log: E - Expect "to_have_url" with timeout 5000ms E 9 × unexpected value "https://example.com/"

testcase.name: test_page_form_components_visibility

failure.message: AssertionError: Locator expected to be visible Actual value: None Error: element(s) not found Call log: - Expect "to_be_visible" with timeout 15000ms - waiting for locator("#navbarNavDropdown").first

testcase.failure: tests\page_10_be84\test_page_10_be84.py:21: in test_page_form_components_visibility expect(page.locator("#navbarNavDropdown").first).to_be_visible(timeout=15000) E AssertionError: Locator expected to be visible E Actual value: None E Error: element(s) not found E Call log: E - Expect "to_be_visible" with timeout 15000ms E - waiting for locator("#navbarNavDropdown").first

testcase.name: test_page_choose_button_functionality

failure.message: AssertionError: Locator expected to be visible Actual value: None Error: element(s) not found Call log: - Expect "to_be_visible" with timeout 15000ms - waiting for locator("button.btn.btn-secondary.btn-choose").first

testcase.failure: tests\page_10_be84\test_page_10_be84.py:28: in test_page_choose_button_functionality expect(page.locator("button.btn.btn-secondary.btn-choose").first).to_be_visible(timeout=15000) E AssertionError: Locator expected to be visible E Actual value: None E Error: element(s) not found E Call log: E - Expect "to_be_visible" with timeout 15000ms E - waiting for locator("button.btn.btn-secondary.btn-choose").first

failure.message: AssertionError: Locator expected to be visible Actual value: None Error: element(s) not found Call log: - Expect "to_be_visible" with timeout 15000ms - waiting for locator("button.btn.btn-warning.btn-reset").first

testcase.name: test_page_file_upload_heading_visibility

failure.message:
AssertionError: Locator expected to contain text 'File Upload' Actual value: Example Domain Call log: - Expect "to_contain_text" with timeout 15000ms - waiting for locator("h1").first 18 × locator resolved to

Example Domain

- unexpected value "Example Domain"

testcase.failure:
tests\page_10_be84\test_page_10_be84.py:43: in test_page_file_upload_heading_visibility expect(page.locator("h1").first).to_contain_text("File Upload", timeout=15000) E AssertionError: Locator expected to contain text 'File Upload' E Actual value: Example Domain E Call log: E - Expect "to_contain_text" with timeout 15000ms E - waiting for locator("h1").first E 18 × locator resolved to

Example Domain

E - unexpected value "Example Domain"
